docs.title: its Core
docs.text:
This ontology defines core concepts related to intelligent transport systems (ITS).

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/citydata/part2/v1/CityPattern.owl

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • ITS Class

The formal definition of this pattern is available in OWL Syntax.
